message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Compass Sequence Diagram

actor User
participant "HubSpot" as HubSpot
participant "TypeForm" as TypeForm
participant "TypeForm API" as TypeFormAPI
participant "Node App" as NodeApp

box "AWS" #LightGray
    participant "S3 Bucket" as S3Bucket
    participant "SES" as SES
end box

User -> HubSpot: Loads Compass
activate HubSpot
HubSpot -> HubSpot: Generate UUID to identify user
HubSpot -> TypeForm: Load embedded TypeForm survery
activate TypeForm
User -> TypeForm: Completes survey
TypeForm -> HubSpot: Redirects to HubSpot Landing Page Submission Form\nhttps://info.codurance.com/en/compass-details-submission
deactivate TypeForm
User -> HubSpot: Completes submission form
HubSpot -> HubSpot: Save submission info\n& contact in Hubspot
HubSpot -> NodeApp: Redirects to /report/submit/:uuid (to generate report)
activate NodeApp
NodeApp -> NodeApp: Start report generation
HubSpot <- NodeApp: Redirects to HubSpot Thanks Landing Page\n"https://info.codurance.com/en/compass-successful-submission"
deactivate HubSpot
NodeApp -> TypeFormAPI: Gets survery questions & answers
activate TypeFormAPI
TypeFormAPI --> NodeApp: 
deactivate TypeFormAPI
note right of User: generate report\nand send email
NodeApp -> HubSpot: Get user details
activate HubSpot
HubSpot --> NodeApp: 
deactivate HubSpot
NodeApp -> NodeApp: Build report and render with jsreport
NodeApp -> S3Bucket: Upload report to AWS S3 bucket
activate S3Bucket
S3Bucket --> NodeApp: Query report link
deactivate S3Bucket
NodeApp -> NodeApp: Compose email data with report pdf link
NodeApp -> SES: Queue email for sending
activate SES
SES --> User: Send email to user
deactivate SES
deactivate NodeApp

@enduml
```
